description: Generate envelope help hypotheses by correlating all views geometrically (no dimensions)

content.value:
Step 3B: Envelope Help (Hypotheses). You MUST use your vision capabilities.
Please correlate and understand all the views and identify any points that will help in calculating the overall envelope later.
Have them as hypotheses.
DO NOT look at dimensions, just look at the geometry. This should not bias other steps.
Return a JSON object with: envelopeHelpHypotheses (array of strings).
